title: Book | Your Name
description: A booking and contact page for the starter template.
heroText: This page can support direct contact, one booking link, or both. Turn Calendly on when you are ready, or keep it hidden and use email first.

cards.title: Use this for
cards.text: Intro calls, exploratory conversations, quick fit checks, or the first step into a larger collaboration.

cards.title: When email is better
cards.text: Use direct contact first if the topic needs background, context, or a short note before deciding whether to book time.

cards.title: Languages and logistics
cards.text: This area works well for language preferences, time zones, response time, or any practical expectation-setting.

cards.title: Why keep this page simple
cards.text: A clear page with one next step usually converts better than several unclear options.

faq.question: Do I need Calendly to use this template?
faq.answer: No. You can keep booking hidden and use direct contact only. Turn Calendly on later when you are ready.

faq.question: Can this page be bilingual?
faq.answer: Yes. Keep the same structure in each locale and adjust the wording to match the audience.

faq.question: Should I offer more than one booking option?
faq.answer: Usually one clear option is enough for a first version. Add more only when you know they help.

faq.question: Can I replace the link with another booking tool?
faq.answer: Yes. The booking option is just a URL field, so you can swap Calendly for another service.

faq.question: What if I only want email contact?
faq.answer: Set showCalendly to false and keep the direct contact details plus one clear email CTA.
